entries.name: IntervalPayouts
entries.description: Immutable payout stream that can pull a fixed amount of a configured asset from the Railgun treasury to a fixed beneficiary whenever the next interval is due.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: transfer ETH or ERC20s out of the treasury.

treasury.description: Treasury contract that this payout stream can draw funds from.

beneficiary.description: Fixed recipient that receives each interval payout.

token.description: Asset paid out by this stream.

amount.description: Amount transferred on each successful payout.

intervalLength.description: Minimum delay between payout intervals, in seconds.

totalPayouts.description: Maximum number of payouts that this stream can execute.

startTime.description: Timestamp after which the first payout interval becomes eligible.

entries.name: GovernorRewardsSweeper
entries.description: Helper that forwards all ETH or ERC20 balances it holds to a fixed receiver.

$admin.description: Direct proxy admin of the Sweeper proxy.

receiver.description: Fixed recipient that receives every ETH or ERC20 balance swept by this contract.

entries.name: ProxyAdmin
entries.description: Admin interface for Railgun's pausable upgradeable proxies. It does not hold funds, but its controller can operate every proxy attached to it.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: pause, unpause, transfer proxy ownership, or upgrade the GovernorRewards implementation.
pause, unpause, transfer proxy ownership, or upgrade the treasury implementation.
pause, unpause, transfer proxy ownership, or upgrade the Railgun smart wallet implementation.

owner.description: Controller that can operate any Railgun proxy administered by this ProxyAdmin.

entries.name: VerificationKeySetter_64DA
entries.description: Auxiliary verifier-key staging contract. Its owner stores replacement verification keys locally and, if Railgun governance switches the contract into COMMITTING state, can register the new keys in the Railgun smart wallet verifier.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: update the Railgun smart wallet SNARK verifying keys through the Delegator.

owner.description: Current operator that can stage verification keys, move the helper into WAITING, and return it to SETTING after governance has opened the COMMITTING phase.

delegator.description: Railgun Delegator contract that can switch this helper into COMMITTING and is the contract used to forward verifier-key updates onward.

verifier.description: Railgun smart wallet verifier contract whose verification keys this helper can update through the Delegator.

state.description: Current workflow phase: SETTING, WAITING, or COMMITTING. Only COMMITTING allows the owner to forward staged verification keys to the verifier.

receivedPermissions.description: pause, unpause, transfer proxy ownership, or upgrade the Sweeper implementation.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: update the Railgun smart wallet SNARK verifying keys through the Delegator.

owner.description: Current operator that can stage verification keys, move the helper into WAITING, and return it to SETTING after governance has opened the COMMITTING phase.

entries.name: GovernorRewards
entries.description: Reward distributor that pulls assets from the Railgun treasury and allocates them to stakers via token voting.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: transfer ETH or ERC20s out of the treasury.

$admin.description: Proxy admin that can pause, unpause, transfer proxy ownership, or upgrade the GovernorRewards proxy.

owner.description: Current owner of the GovernorRewards logic.

staking.description: Staking contract whose snapshots determine each interval's reward allocation.

treasury.description: Treasury contract that supplies tokens distributed by GovernorRewards.

intervalBP.description: Basis points of treasury balance earmarked for rewards on each distribution interval.

STAKING_DISTRIBUTION_INTERVAL_MULTIPLIER.description: Number of staking snapshot intervals combined into one rewards interval.

entries.name: LegacySweeper
entries.description: Older Railgun sweeper generation that still holds Treasury transfer rights. It is upgradeable and forwards balances to an immutable receiver.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: transfer ETH or ERC20s out of the treasury.

$admin.description: Direct proxy admin of the legacy Sweeper proxy.

entries.name: IntervalPayouts
entries.description: Immutable payout stream that can pull a fixed amount of a configured asset from the Railgun treasury to a fixed beneficiary whenever the next interval is due.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: transfer ETH or ERC20s out of the treasury.

startTime.description: Timestamp after which the first payout interval becomes eligible.

entries.name: RelayAdapt
entries.description: Execution adapter contract for Railgun. To interact with public contracts from shielded pools, tokens are unshielded to RelayAdapter, which performs specified calls and shields tokens back to the same user.

entries.name: Delegator
entries.description: Permission router proxy owned by Railgun governance.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: switch the VKeySetter into COMMITTING so its owner can push stored verification keys to the verifier.
switch the VKeySetter into COMMITTING so its owner can push stored verification keys to the verifier.
add or remove allowed reward safety vectors.
add or remove reward tokens from the distribution set.
change the per-interval reward rate.
pause, unpause, transfer proxy ownership, or upgrade the legacy Sweeper implementation.
mint additional RAIL up to the hard cap and transfer token ownership.
grant or revoke treasury roles, including who can move ETH and ERC20s out of the treasury.
transfer ETH or ERC20s out of the treasury.
add or remove allowed SNARK safety vectors.
add or remove tokens from the shielding blocklist.
change the shield, unshield, and NFT fee schedule.
change the treasury that receives protocol fees.

owner.description: Current controller of the Delegator. The owner bypasses the permission bitmap and can call any target through this contract.

$delegatedPermissionsRaw.description: Internal raw delegated permission map keyed by caller, reconstructed from GrantPermission and RevokePermission events before filtering out callers with no remaining permissions.

delegatedPermissions.description: Current non-owner delegated call permissions as active [caller, permissions[]] pairs, filtered to callers that still retain at least one delegated permission.

delegatedCallers.description: Addresses that currently retain at least one delegated permission through the Delegator.

verificationKeyDelegates.description: Delegated callers currently allowed to update Railgun smart wallet SNARK verification keys through the Delegator.

receivedPermissions.description: stage replacement verification keys and manage the helper's local SETTING and WAITING states.

entries.name: Voting
entries.description: Token-weighted Railgun governance contract. Proposals must be sponsored, voted through quorum, and then executed through the Delegator.

receivedPermissions.description: switch the VKeySetter into COMMITTING so its owner can push stored verification keys to the verifier.
switch the VKeySetter into COMMITTING so its owner can push stored verification keys to the verifier.
add or remove allowed reward safety vectors.
add or remove reward tokens from the distribution set.
change the per-interval reward rate.
pause, unpause, transfer proxy ownership, or upgrade the GovernorRewards implementation.
pause, unpause, transfer proxy ownership, or upgrade the legacy Sweeper implementation.
grant or revoke delegated caller permissions and transfer ownership of the Delegator.
mint additional RAIL up to the hard cap and transfer token ownership.
grant or revoke treasury roles, including who can move ETH and ERC20s out of the treasury.
pause, unpause, transfer proxy ownership, or upgrade the treasury implementation.
transfer ETH or ERC20s out of the treasury.
transfer ETH or ERC20s out of the treasury.
transfer ETH or ERC20s out of the treasury.
add or remove allowed SNARK safety vectors.
add or remove tokens from the shielding blocklist.
change the shield, unshield, and NFT fee schedule.
change the treasury that receives protocol fees.
pause, unpause, transfer proxy ownership, or upgrade the Railgun smart wallet implementation.

DELEGATOR_CONTRACT.description: Delegator contract that executes successful proposal actions.

STAKING_CONTRACT.description: Staking contract whose snapshots determine sponsorship and voting power.

QUORUM.description: Minimum affirmative voting power required for a proposal to reach quorum.

PROPOSAL_SPONSOR_THRESHOLD.description: Minimum sponsorship required before a proposal can be moved into the voting phase.

SPONSOR_WINDOW.description: Maximum time after publication during which a proposal can collect sponsorship.

SPONSOR_LOCKOUT_TIME.description: Cooldown that limits how often the same account can newly sponsor different proposals.

VOTING_START_OFFSET.description: Delay between calling a proposal to vote and the opening of the voting window.

VOTING_YAY_END_OFFSET.description: Deadline for casting affirmative votes after a vote has been called.

VOTING_NAY_END_OFFSET.description: Deadline for casting negative votes after a vote has been called.

EXECUTION_START_OFFSET.description: Delay between a successful vote and when execution can begin.

EXECUTION_END_OFFSET.description: End of the execution window for a successful proposal.

entries.name: IntervalPayouts
entries.description: Immutable payout stream that can pull a fixed amount of a configured asset from the Railgun treasury to a fixed beneficiary whenever the next interval is due.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: transfer ETH or ERC20s out of the treasury.

beneficiary.description: Fixed recipient that receives each interval payout.

token.description: Asset paid out by this stream.

amount.description: Amount transferred on each successful payout.

intervalLength.description: Minimum delay between payout intervals, in seconds.

totalPayouts.description: Maximum number of payouts that this stream can execute.

startTime.description: Timestamp after which the first payout interval becomes eligible.

entries.name: Rail Token
entries.description: RAIL governance token contract with a capped (100,000,000 RAIL total supply) mint schedule and an early anti-bot transfer override.

owner.description: Current governance-controlled minter of the RAIL token.

cap.description: Hard cap on total RAIL supply.

entries.name: Treasury
entries.description: Collects Railgun fees. Managed through access control roles.

$admin.description: Proxy admin that can pause, unpause, transfer proxy ownership, or upgrade the treasury proxy.

DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE.description: Identifier of the role that administers every treasury role.

TRANSFER_ROLE.description: Identifier of the role that authorizes ETH and ERC20 transfers out of the treasury.

accessControl.description: Current treasury role memberships reconstructed from AccessControl events.

defaultAdminRoleMembers.description: Addresses that currently hold DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE on the treasury.

transferRoleMembers.description: Addresses that currently hold TRANSFER_ROLE on the treasury.

entries.name: Getters
entries.description: Read-only helper contract that batches governance snapshot and reward-view calls.

staking.description: Staking contract queried for snapshot history and voting-power data.

governorRewards.description: Configured contract address used by the reward-view helper methods.

entries.name: Staking
entries.description: RAIL staking contract that tracks delegated voting power, enforces a 1mo unstake delay, and snapshots staking balances for governance every 1d. Its parameters define the governance voting system.

stakingToken.description: RAIL token contract that users lock here to obtain voting power.

STAKE_LOCKTIME.description: Delay between unlocking a stake and being able to claim the underlying RAIL.

SNAPSHOT_INTERVAL.description: Length of the interval used when taking governance voting-power snapshots.

entries.name: IntervalPayouts
entries.description: Immutable payout stream that can pull a fixed amount of a configured asset from the Railgun treasury to a fixed beneficiary whenever the next interval is due.

directlyReceivedPermissions.description: transfer ETH or ERC20s out of the treasury.

treasury.description: Treasury contract that this payout stream can draw funds from.

beneficiary.description: Fixed recipient that receives each interval payout.

token.description: Asset paid out by this stream.

amount.description: Amount transferred on each successful payout.

intervalLength.description: Minimum delay between payout intervals, in seconds.

totalPayouts.description: Maximum number of payouts that this stream can execute.

startTime.description: Timestamp after which the first payout interval becomes eligible.

entries.name: RailgunSmartWallet
entries.description: Main system contract and escrow that accepts shielded deposits, verifies private transactions and unshields, and maintains the commitment tree.

$admin.description: Proxy admin that can pause, unpause, transfer proxy ownership, or upgrade the Railgun smart wallet proxy.

owner.description: Governance-controlled owner of the smart wallet logic.

treasury.description: Treasury contract that receives shield and unshield fees.

shieldFee.description: Basis-point fee charged on shield operations.

unshieldFee.description: Basis-point fee charged on unshield operations.

nftFee.description: Flat fee placeholder for NFT flows. The source notes that NFT fee logic is not currently implemented.

tokenBlocklist.description: Tokens currently blocked from being newly shielded into Railgun, reconstructed from blocklist events.

ZERO_VALUE.description: Base zero value used to seed the commitment-tree zero hash chain.

zeros.description: Precomputed zero hashes for the 16-level commitment tree.
